# Regex fixtures for skill: deploy-gate
# Format: one directive per non-empty, non-comment line.
#   MATCH: <prompt>     — regex from config/default-triggers.json for this skill must match
#   NO_MATCH: <prompt>  — regex must NOT match
# Tested deterministically by tests/test-regex-fixtures.sh (zero LLM cost).
# NO_MATCH lines: first two pin the release word boundary (preRELEASE and
# unRELEASEd must not fire); third is borrowed verbatim from capture-knowledge
# MATCH fixtures (no deploy/release/promote/launch/go.live in that prompt).

MATCH: deploy to production tonight
MATCH: release to production tonight
MATCH: promote the build to staging
MATCH: are we ready to go live

NO_MATCH: pin the prerelease dependency
NO_MATCH: unreleased changes in the changelog
NO_MATCH: capture this knowledge before we forget it
